DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_ATTACK.title: Familiar Attack
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_ATTACK.description: Deal {Damage:diff:} damage. Counts as a Strike.
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_WARD.title: Familiar Ward
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_SHIELD.title: Familiar Shield
DMFDWITCHMOD-HEAL_INCANTATION.title: Heal Incantation
DMFDWITCHMOD-HEAL_INCANTATION.descriptio: Set your [gold]Base Sigil[/gold] to [pink]Heal[/pink]. [gold]Release[/gold] generates healing cards.
DMFDWITCHMOD-WIND_INCANTATION.title: Wind Incantation
DMFDWITCHMOD-WIND_INCANTATION.descriptio: Set your [gold]Base Sigil[/gold] to [green]Wind[/green]. [gold]Release[/gold] generates Wind spell cards that apply [gold]Weak[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-FIRE_INCANTATION.title: Fire Incantation
DMFDWITCHMOD-FIRE_INCANTATION.descriptio: Set your [gold]Base Sigil[/gold] to [red]Fire[/red]. [gold]Release[/gold] generates Fire spell cards that apply [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-INSTANT_MAGIC_BULLET.title: Instant Magic Bullet
DMFDWITCHMOD-INSTANT_MAGIC_BULLET.descri: Deal {Damage:diff:} {DamageConverted:show:damage|damage ([gold]Magical Attack[/gold])}{DamageConverted:show:.| (scales with [gold]Intelligence[/gold]).} Draw {Cards} card. If you draw an Incantation, gain {Energy:energyIcons:}.
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_ALL_OUT_ATTACK.des: For each Familiar attack card played this combat, deal {Damage:diff:} damage once (up to {IfUpgraded:show:9|7} times). Currently {Hits} times.
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_MULTI_HIT.title: Familiar Multi-Hit
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_INTERFERENCE.title: Familiar Interference
DMFDWITCHMOD-ARCANE_SHIELD.title: Arcane Shield
DMFDWITCHMOD-ARCANE_SHIELD.description: Gain {Block:diff:} [gold]Block[/gold] (scales with [gold]Intelligence[/gold]). Costs {EnergyReduction:energyIcons:} less for each Incantation played this turn.
DMFDWITCHMOD-DIVINATION.title: Divination
DMFDWITCHMOD-DIVINATION.description: Draw 1 card. For each unique [gold]debuff[/gold] on you, draw 1 additional card.
DMFDWITCHMOD-LEVITATION.title: Levitation
DMFDWITCHMOD-LEVITATION.description: For {Turns:diff:} turns, reduce damage you take by 30%. Stacks up to 5 turns.
DMFDWITCHMOD-SHINE.title: Shine
DMFDWITCHMOD-SHINE.description: At the start of your next {Turns:diff:} turns, gain {Energy:energyIcons:}. Stacks up to 5 turns.
DMFDWITCHMOD-ICE_INCANTATION.title: Ice Incantation
DMFDWITCHMOD-ICE_INCANTATION.description: Set your [gold]Base Sigil[/gold] to [blue]Ice[/blue]. [gold]Release[/gold] generates Ice spell cards that apply [gold]Frostbite[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-THUNDER_INCANTATION.title: Thunder Incantation
DMFDWITCHMOD-THUNDER_INCANTATION.descrip: Set your [gold]Base Sigil[/gold] to [gold]Thunder[/gold]. [gold]Release[/gold] generates Thunder spell cards that apply [gold]Shock[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-EMPOWER_INCANTATION.title: Empower Incantation
DMFDWITCHMOD-EMPOWER_INCANTATION.descrip: Gain 1 [gold]Empower Sigil[/gold]. Spell cards generated by [gold]Release[/gold] are stronger.
DMFDWITCHMOD-DUAL_EMPOWER_INCANTATION.de: Gain 2 [gold]Empower Sigils[/gold]. Spell cards generated by [gold]Release[/gold] are stronger.
DMFDWITCHMOD-HOMING_INCANTATION.title: Homing Incantation
DMFDWITCHMOD-HOMING_INCANTATION.descript: Set your [gold]Modifier Sigil[/gold] to Homing. [gold]Release[/gold] generates 4 targetable spell cards.
DMFDWITCHMOD-CONDENSE_INCANTATION.title: Condense Incantation
DMFDWITCHMOD-CONDENSE_INCANTATION.descri: Set your [gold]Modifier Sigil[/gold] to Condense. [gold]Release[/gold] generates 1 condensed spell card.
DMFDWITCHMOD-OVERFLOW.title: Overflow
DMFDWITCHMOD-OVERFLOW.description: Whenever [gold]Empower Sigils[/gold] exceed your maximum, deal {Damage:diff:} {DamageConverted:show:damage|damage ([gold]Magical Attack[/gold])} to ALL enemies for each excess{DamageConverted:show:.| (scales with [gold]Intelligence[/gold]).}
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_SUPPORT.title: Familiar Support
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_SUPPORT.descriptio: Gain {Block:diff:} [gold]Block[/gold]. Choose 1 card from your [gold]draw pile[/gold] and put it into your [gold]hand[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_SUPPORT.selectionS: Choose a card to put into your [gold]hand[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGIC_BOUNDARY.title: Magic Boundary
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGIC_BOUNDARY.description: Lose {DexterityLoss} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Gain {Plating:diff:} [gold]Plating[/gold]. If you have an [gold]Empower Sigil[/gold], remove 1 and gain {ExtraPlating:diff:} additional [gold]Plating[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-PURGE.title: Purge
DMFDWITCHMOD-PURGE.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all Status cards in your [gold]hand[/gold]. Gain {Energy:energyIcons:} for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this way.
DMFDWITCHMOD-SIGIL_ECHO.title: Sigil Echo
DMFDWITCHMOD-SIGIL_ECHO.description: Once per turn, whenever you replace a [gold]Sigil[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons:} and draw 1 card.
DMFDWITCHMOD-MANA_CONVERSION.title: Mana Conversion
DMFDWITCHMOD-MANA_CONVERSION.description: Whenever you would gain the same [gold]Base Sigil[/gold] or [gold]Modifier Sigil[/gold] you already have, gain 1 [gold]Empower Sigil[/gold] instead.
DMFDWITCHMOD-MIND_REFINEMENT.title: Mind Refinement
DMFDWITCHMOD-DRAGON_SPHERE.title: Dragon Sphere
DMFDWITCHMOD-DRAGON_SPHERE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Heal to full HP.|Heal 50% HP.} At the start of each of your turns, gain {Energy:energyIcons:}. Whenever you gain or draw a Status card, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it. In Elite and Boss combats, whenever you spend {CostReduction:energyIcons:}, this card costs {CostReduction:energyIcons:} less this combat.
DMFDWITCHMOD-DRAGON_SURGE.title: Dragon Surge
DMFDWITCHMOD-DRAGON_SURGE.description: This turn, Incantations{IfUpgraded:show: and Attacks|} cost {Energy:energyIcons:} less. Add 1 [gold]Dragon Release[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold]. For each [gold]Sigil[/gold] you have, this card costs 1 more.
DMFDWITCHMOD-QUICK_CAST.title: Dragon Release
DMFDWITCHMOD-QUICK_CAST.description: [gold]Release[/gold] without clearing your [gold]Sigils[/gold]. Auto-play the generated spell cards. Returns to your [gold]hand[/gold] after being played.
DMFDWITCHMOD-CAST_MAGIC.title: Spell Release
DMFDWITCHMOD-CAST_MAGIC.description: [gold]Release[/gold] and clear all Sigils. Whenever you gain a [gold]Base Sigil[/gold], if this is in your [gold]draw pile[/gold] or [gold]discard pile[/gold], put it on top of your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-MASTERED_CAST.title: Mastered Release
DMFDWITCHMOD-MASTERED_CAST.description: [gold]Release[/gold] and clear all Sigils. Whenever you gain a [gold]Base Sigil[/gold], return this to your [gold]hand[/gold] from [gold]draw pile[/gold] or [gold]discard pile[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGIC_BULLET.title: Magic Bullet
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGIC_BULLET.description: Deal {Damage:diff:} {DamageConverted:show:damage|damage ([gold]Magical Attack[/gold])} to a random enemy.
DMFDWITCHMOD-FIRE_ATTACK.title: Fire
DMFDWITCHMOD-FIRE_ATTACK.description: Deal {Damage:diff:} {DamageConverted:show:damage|damage ([gold]Magical Attack[/gold])} to a random enemy. Apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-WIND_ATTACK.title: Wind
DMFDWITCHMOD-WIND_ATTACK.description: Deal {Damage:diff:} {DamageConverted:show:damage|damage ([gold]Magical Attack[/gold])} to a random enemy. Apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-ICE_ATTACK.title: Ice
DMFDWITCHMOD-ICE_ATTACK.description: Deal {Damage:diff:} {DamageConverted:show:damage|damage ([gold]Magical Attack[/gold])} to a random enemy. Apply 1 [gold]Frostbite[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-THUNDER_ATTACK.title: Thunder
DMFDWITCHMOD-THUNDER_ATTACK.description: Deal {Damage:diff:} {DamageConverted:show:damage|damage ([gold]Magical Attack[/gold])} to a random enemy. Apply 1 [gold]Shock[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-HEALING.title: Healing
DMFDWITCHMOD-HOMING_MAGIC_BULLET.title: Homing Magic Bullet
DMFDWITCHMOD-CONDENSE_MAGIC_BULLET.title: Condensed Magic Bullet
DMFDWITCHMOD-HOMING_FIRE_ATTACK.title: Homing Fire
DMFDWITCHMOD-CONDENSE_FIRE_ATTACK.title: Condensed Fire
DMFDWITCHMOD-CONDENSE_FIRE_ATTACK.descri: Deal {Damage:diff:} {DamageConverted:show:damage|damage ([gold]Magical Attack[/gold])} to all enemies. Apply 3 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-HOMING_WIND_ATTACK.title: Homing Wind
DMFDWITCHMOD-CONDENSE_WIND_ATTACK.title: Condensed Wind
DMFDWITCHMOD-CONDENSE_WIND_ATTACK.descri: Deal {Damage:diff:} {DamageConverted:show:damage|damage ([gold]Magical Attack[/gold])} to all enemies. Apply 3 [gold]Weak[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-HOMING_ICE_ATTACK.title: Homing Ice
DMFDWITCHMOD-CONDENSE_ICE_ATTACK.title: Condensed Ice
DMFDWITCHMOD-CONDENSE_ICE_ATTACK.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff:} {DamageConverted:show:damage|damage ([gold]Magical Attack[/gold])} to all enemies. Apply 3 [gold]Frostbite[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-HOMING_THUNDER_ATTACK.title: Homing Thunder
DMFDWITCHMOD-HOMING_HEALING.title: Homing Healing
DMFDWITCHMOD-HOMING_HEALING.description: Heal the target {Heal:diff:} HP, and heal yourself {SelfHeal:diff:} HP.
DMFDWITCHMOD-CONDENSE_THUNDER_ATTACK.des: Deal {Damage:diff:} {DamageConverted:show:damage|damage ([gold]Magical Attack[/gold])} to all enemies. Apply 3 [gold]Shock[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-CONDENSE_HEALING.title: Condensed Healing
DMFDWITCHMOD-CONDENSE_HEALING.descriptio: Heal all players {HealEach:diff:} HP immediately, then heal {HealEach:diff:} HP at the start of each of the next 2 turns.
DMFDWITCHMOD-REGEN_INCANTATION.title: Regen Incantation
DMFDWITCHMOD-REGEN_INCANTATION.descripti: Set your [gold]Base Sigil[/gold] to [purple]Regen[/purple]. [gold]Release[/gold] generates Regen cards.
DMFDWITCHMOD-REGEN.title: Regen
DMFDWITCHMOD-HOMING_REGEN.title: Homing Regen
DMFDWITCHMOD-HOMING_REGEN.description: Apply {Amount} [gold]Regen[/gold] to the target, and heal yourself {SelfHeal:diff:} HP.
DMFDWITCHMOD-CONDENSE_REGEN.title: Condensed Regen
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGIC_BERSERK.title: Magic Berserk
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGIC_BERSERK.description: At the start of each of your turns, gain 1 [gold]Empower Sigil[/gold] and add 1 Void to your [gold]discard pile[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-FULL_EMPOWER_INCANTATION.de: Gain 4 [gold]Empower Sigils[/gold]. Spell cards generated by [gold]Release[/gold] are stronger.
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGIC_MASTERY.title: Magic Mastery
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGIC_MASTERY.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all Familiar cards in your [gold]hand[/gold]. Gain 1 [gold]Intelligence[/gold] for each card exhausted this way.
DMFDWITCHMOD-CHAOTIC_INCANTATION.title: Chaotic Incantation
DMFDWITCHMOD-CHAOTIC_INCANTATION.descrip: Gain 1 random elemental [gold]Base Sigil[/gold] and 1 random [gold]Modifier Sigil[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-CURE_AILMENT.title: Cure Ailment
DMFDWITCHMOD-CURE_AILMENT.description: Remove your [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], [gold]Weak[/gold], and [gold]Frail[/gold]. If you have an [gold]Empower Sigil[/gold], remove 1 and gain [gold]Immunity[/gold] for 3 turns.
DMFDWITCHMOD-STATUS_BOOST.title: Status Boost
DMFDWITCHMOD-STATUS_BOOST.description: For 2 turns, gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold], [gold]Dexterity[/gold], and [gold]Intelligence[/gold]. If you have an [gold]Empower Sigil[/gold], remove 1 and extend the duration by {IfUpgraded:show:4|3} turns.
DMFDWITCHMOD-WITCHS_EXECUTION.title: Witch's Execution
DMFDWITCHMOD-WITCHS_EXECUTION.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff:} {DamageConverted:show:damage|damage ([gold]Magical Attack[/gold])}{DamageConverted:show:.| (scales with 2x [gold]Intelligence[/gold]).} This attack deals {BonusDamage} more damage for each stack of the [gold]debuff[/gold] corresponding to your current Dragon Contract, then removes all stacks of that [gold]debuff[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-SPELLBLADE.title: Spellblade
DMFDWITCHMOD-SPELLBLADE.description: Deal {Damage:diff:} {DamageConverted:show:damage|damage ([gold]Magical Attack[/gold])}{DamageConverted:show:.| (scales with [gold]Intelligence[/gold]).} Draw 1 card for each unique [gold]debuff[/gold] on the enemy, up to {MaxCards:diff:}.
DMFDWITCHMOD-ASTRAL_CURSE.title: Astral Curse
DMFDWITCHMOD-ASTRAL_CURSE.description: Apply the same amounts of [gold]Strength loss[/gold], [gold]Dexterity loss[/gold], [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], and [gold]Weak[/gold] you have to an enemy (up to 10 stacks).
DMFDWITCHMOD-DEFENSIVE_FORMATION.title: Defensive Formation
DMFDWITCHMOD-DEFENSIVE_FORMATION.descrip: At the start of each of your turns, move 1 Familiar Skill from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold] and upgrade it.
DMFDWITCHMOD-MANA_SHOCK.title: Mana Shock
DMFDWITCHMOD-MANA_SHOCK.description: Deal {Damage:diff:} {DamageConverted:show:damage|damage ([gold]Magical Attack[/gold])} to ALL enemies{DamageConverted:show:.| (scales with [gold]Intelligence[/gold]).} [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 random non-Skill card from your [gold]hand[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-MANA_ABSORPTION.title: Mana Absorption
DMFDWITCHMOD-MANA_ABSORPTION.description: Deal {Damage:diff:} {DamageConverted:show:damage|damage ([gold]Magical Attack[/gold])}{DamageConverted:show:.| (scales with [gold]Intelligence[/gold]).} If the enemy has a [gold]debuff[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons:}.
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_SACRIFICE.title: Familiar Sacrifice
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_SACRIFICE.descript: Deal {Damage:diff:} damage to ALL enemies. Gain {Block:diff:} [gold]Block[/gold]. Your Familiar disappears, and you cannot play Familiar cards except [gold]Familiar Re-awaken[/gold]. After playing, add 1 [gold]Familiar Re-awaken[/gold] to a random position in your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_REAWAKEN.title: Familiar Re-awaken
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_REAWAKEN.descripti: Lose {StrengthLoss} [gold]Strength[/gold]. Re-awaken your Familiar and remove [gold]Familiar Disappeared[/gold]. Becomes [gold]Familiar Sacrifice[/gold] after being played.
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_POWER_UP.title: Familiar Power-up
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_POWER_UP.descripti: At the start of each of your turns, lose {HpLoss} HP. Familiar attack cards apply Dragon Contract effects twice.
